  Builds the cluster's OIDC JSON Web Key Set (the /openid/v1/jwks document) from the service-account public key(s), byte-identically to kОps: kid = base64url(SHA256(PKIX-DER(pubkey))), kty=RSA, alg=RS256, use=sig, with n/e from the RSA key. Matches kubectl get --raw /openid/v1/jwks.

# kopsutils_service_account_jwks (Data Source)

Builds the cluster's OIDC JSON Web Key Set (the /openid/v1/jwks document) from the service-account public key(s), byte-identically to kОps: kid = base64url(SHA256(PKIX-DER(pubkey))), kty=RSA, alg=RS256, use=sig, with n/e from the RSA key. Matches `kubectl get --raw /openid/v1/jwks`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Build the cluster's OIDC JSON Web Key Set (the /openid/v1/jwks document) from
# the service-account public key(s), byte-identically to kОps.
data "kopsutils_service_account_jwks" "this" {
  service_account_public_keys = file("${path.module}/service-account.pub")
}

output "jwks_json" {
  value = data.kopsutils_service_account_jwks.this.json
}

output "jwks_kids" {
  value = [for k in data.kopsutils_service_account_jwks.this.keys : k.kid]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_account_public_keys` (String) The service-account public key PEM(s). Accepts kОps' "RSA PUBLIC KEY"-labeled PKIX blocks as well as conventional "PUBLIC KEY" blocks; multiple blocks may be concatenated.

### Read-Only

- `json` (String) The full JWKS document ({"keys":[...]}), byte-identical to what the API server serves at /openid/v1/jwks.
- `keys` (Attributes List) The structured JWK entries, sorted by kid. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--keys))

<a id="nestedatt--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `keys`

Read-Only:

- `alg` (String) Signing algorithm (RS256).
- `e` (String) RSA public exponent (base64url).
- `kid` (String) Key ID: base64url(SHA256(PKIX-DER(pubkey))).
- `kty` (String) Key type (RSA).
- `n` (String) RSA modulus (base64url).
- `use` (String) Public key use (sig).
